arts.ttl: Forward travelling ahead of transfer to Ipswich Town – Could be available for Liverpool visit
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Paraguayan media that Brighton & Hove Albion forward Julio Enciso is on the verge of signing for Ipswich Town. The 20-year-old has been linked with a move to the Premier League side during this window as they look to add to their squad before next month’s deadline. Christian Pérez reports The post Forward travelling ahead of transfer to Ipswich Town – Could be available for Liverpool visit appeared first on Sport Witness.
